theme_and_archetype.mood: Command-center, high-stakes, hyper-advanced, mysterious yet authoritative
theme_and_archetype.rationale: The user explicitly requested a Premium Dark Cyberpunk theme, background #0A0A0A, and neon accents. This perfectly matches Archetype 7, blending elite performance with an aggressive, futuristic aesthetic.

typography.rules: High contrast font pairing. Smooth UI reading vs Monospaced Terminal data.

spacing_and_layout.panels: flex flex-col h-full bg-[#111111]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden
spacing_and_layout.hierarchy: Always ensure map/graph takes up central prominent space, surrounded by dense analytical widgets on side panels.

visual_effects.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl and bg-black/40 with 1px border-white/10. Do not use muddy grey transparency.
visual_effects.depth_over_borders: Rely on ambient shadows (shadow-[0_4px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]) and inner borders (ring-1 ring-white/5) instead of thick solid borders.
visual_effects.scanlines: Optional repeating-linear-gradient overlay on terminal panels to give CRT retro-futurism feel.

buttons.primary: bg-[#39ff14]/10 text-[#39ff14] border border-[#39ff14]/50 hover:bg-[#39ff14]/20 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(57,255,20,0.5)] transition-all uppercase text-xs tracking-widest
buttons.critical: bg-[#ff003c]/10 text-[#ff003c] border border-[#ff003c]/50 hover:bg-[#ff003c]/20 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,60,0.5)] transition-all uppercase text-xs tracking-widest

cards.base: bg-[#111111]/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 p-4 rounded-lg relative overflow-hidden

terminal_feed.container: font-mono text-xs bg-black/80 border border-white/10 p-4 rounded-lg overflow-y-auto
terminal_feed.typing_animation: Use framer-motion staggerChildren for character-by-character typing effect on critical replays.

map_2d.style: Lightweight SVG or Canvas based 2D world map (e.g., using react-simple-maps or custom SVG). Nodes are glowing dots. Attack arcs use curved SVG paths with stroke-dasharray animations for flowing data effect.
map_2d.colors: Map fill: #111111, Map stroke: #333333, Attack Arc: #ff003c, Safe node: #39ff14

animations.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward translation (opacity: 0, y: 10) to (opacity: 1, y: 0) over 0.4s.
animations.list_stagger: Staggered entrance for lists and feed items (stagger 0.05s).
animations.typing: Cinematic terminal replay needs true typing effect (character by character reveal).
animations.micro_interactions: Scale button down to 0.98 on tap/click.

icons.style: Clean, line-based, stroke-width 1.5, sized accurately to text.
icons.usage: Use icons for every section header, nav item, and metric widget to enhance the tech feel.

images.description: Abstract premium dark cyberpunk background, extreme minimalism, deep black void with very subtle neon green and amber glowing grid lines. Use as a fixed background for the app shell with opacity-30 or opacity-20 to maintain readability.
Hacker silhouette. Use in the Intruder Sessions or Attacker Profile modal/panel as a placeholder avatar for unknown threats.
Cybersecurity honey pot glowing node abstract. Use this as a decorative element in the Deception Fabric UI or AI Lure Generator modal.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a responsive React SOC dashboard using Tailwind and Framer Motion. Ensure components have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent.navigation: Use a collapsible sidebar or sleek top nav. CTF Mode toggle must be globally visible.
instructions_to_main_agent.map: Implement a 2D map component (NOT 3D globe) utilizing SVG. Show source to honeypot attack arcs.
instructions_to_main_agent.terminal: Implement an auto-scrolling terminal feed in the bottom left, using JetBrains Mono font and neon colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_mocking: Simulate WebSocket data updates using setInterval to randomly update attack numbers and generate logs in the live feed. Mock AI predictions and Lure generation.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards, especially over glassmorphism panels. Apply focus states.
instructions_to_main_agent.shadcn_overrides: Override shadcn default components (like buttons, dialogs) to remove border-radius if needed or match the neon border aesthetic. Do not use generic grey card components; use glass panels.
